rationale.fidelity: Exactly retains one common daily display set, the eight-item limit, expected margin, and uncertain visitor choice while excluding ranking and personalization.
rationale.managerial_framing: Clearly identifies the daily choice, scarce display slots, displacement trade-off, and modeled purchase-or-exit mechanism.
rationale.scholarly_positioning: Scholarly positioning is not requested or claimed, and no novelty claim is introduced.
rationale.evidence_discipline: Correctly labels the display limit a simplifying assumption and treats ranking, personalization, and foreknowledge claims as unsupported model changes.
rationale.prose_clarity: Economical, concrete, and easy to follow.
rationale.overall: A near-complete and highly readable framing that meets every fidelity requirement without triggering a hard failure.
